final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a tech-brand e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold, hierarchy-driven layout suited for an e-commerce banner — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 as the hero brand subject with 618 anniversary sale as the campaign theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a festive tech-product campaign backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an energetic, celebratory atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand identity (green-toned) with 618 festive energy — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, hero numeral), "周年庆" (secondary label)
Constraints: must read as an e-commerce announcement poster with clear visual hierarchy
Avoid:
